# Central Home Health Services of Texas

> Houston's trusted home health care agency, providing skilled home health care and provider attendant services — including skilled nursing, wound care, medication management, rehabilitation therapy, and remote patient monitoring (RPM) — directly to patients' homes since 2005.

## Business Identity

- **Legal name:** Central Home Health Services of Texas, LLC
- **Brand name:** Central Home Health Care of Texas
- **Founded:** 2005
- **Headquarters:** 720 N Post Oak Road, Suite 140, Houston, TX 77024, United States
- **Service area:** Greater Houston metropolitan area, Harris County, and surrounding Texas counties
- **Type:** Licensed home health care agency offering two service lines: Skilled Home Health and Provider Attendant Services (PAS)
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- **Website:** https://www.centraloftexas.com

## Contact

- **Skilled Home Health phone:** +1 (713) 387-0781
- **Provider Services (PAS) phone:** +1 (713) 461-5696
- **Email:** info@centraloftexas.com
- **Office address:** 720 N Post Oak Rd Ste. 140, Houston, TX 77024

## Services Offered

Central Home Health Services of Texas provides two service lines in the Houston, Texas area:

1. **Skilled Nursing** — Licensed nursing care for patients with complex medical needs, including wound care, medication management, medical social work, and home health aides, plus post-operative care, IV therapy, catheter care, and chronic condition management.
2. **Rehabilitation Therapy** — In-home physical therapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy for post-surgery recovery, stroke rehabilitation, and injury recovery.
3. **Provider Attendant Services (PAS)** — A Medicaid benefit that pairs clients with a dedicated caregiver for non-medical personal care: bathing, dressing, grooming, mobility assistance, meal preparation, light housekeeping, and companionship.
4. **Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM)** — FDA-cleared Bluetooth devices (blood pressure cuff, glucometer, pulse oximeter, weight scale) that transmit patient vitals to clinicians in real time for early intervention and chronic disease management. Medicare-reimbursed.

## Conditions Managed

- Heart failure
- Hypertension (high blood pressure)
- Diabetes
- COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease)
- Stroke recovery
- Post-surgical recovery
- Chronic kidney disease
- Dementia and Alzheimer's
- Parkinson's disease
- Wound care
- Falls risk
- Post-hospitalization recovery

## Insurance & Reimbursement Accepted

- Medicare
- Medicaid (Texas Medicaid)
- Private insurance
- VA (Veterans Administration)
- Workers' compensation
- Long-term care insurance
- Private pay

## Service Area

Primary: Houston, TX and Harris County.
Extended: Fort Bend County, Brazoria County, Galveston County, Montgomery County, and Liberty County.

## Key Personnel

- **Administrator / CEO:** Available for inquiries
- **Director of Nursing (DON):** On-site clinical lead
- **Office:** 720 N Post Oak Rd, Suite 140, Houston, TX 77024

## Careers

We hire for three role families:
- **Nurse (RN / LVN)** — Active Texas RN or LVN license, CPR certification, reliable transportation.
- **Caregiver** — Provider Attendant Services; dependable, caring daily-living support.
- **Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)** — Active Texas CNA certification, CPR certification.

Online applications open soon. Once our compliance process is finalized, applicants will be able to apply directly from the Careers page.

## How to Refer a Patient

Healthcare professionals, hospitals, discharge planners, and families can refer patients:
- Secure referral portal: https://Central.referralflow.health
- Phone (Skilled Home Health): 713-387-0781
- Phone (Provider Services / PAS): 713-461-5696
- Email: info@centraloftexas.com

## License & Accreditation

- Licensed by the Texas Health and Human Services Commission (HHSC)
- Certified by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS)
- Federal Employer ID Number on file

## Why Choose Central Home Health Services of Texas

- 19+ years of experience (since 2005)
- Two dedicated service lines: Skilled Home Health and Provider Attendant Services (PAS)
- All caregivers are licensed, background-checked, and trained
- Personalized care plans for every patient
- Multilingual staff (English and Spanish)
- Medicare-certified agency
- Real-time remote patient monitoring available
- Fast referral response

## Press & Media

For media inquiries, contact the office at 713-387-0781.
